# ezpz.fi Documentation

## Docs

- [Overview](https://docs.ezpz.fi/index.md): What ezpz.fi is — Solana prediction markets with custodial trading.
- [ezpz 101](https://docs.ezpz.fi/ezpz-101.md): Introduction to prediction markets on ezpz.fi.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.ezpz.fi/quickstart.md): Create an account and place your first prediction.

### Core concepts

- [Markets & events](https://docs.ezpz.fi/concepts/markets-events.md): How prediction markets and events are structured.
- [Outcome tokens & positions](https://docs.ezpz.fi/concepts/outcome-tokens.md): YES/NO tokens and how positions work.
- [USDC collateral](https://docs.ezpz.fi/concepts/usdc-collateral.md): How USDC backs every prediction.
- [Prices & AMM](https://docs.ezpz.fi/concepts/prices-amm.md): How odds and AMM pricing work.
- [Resolution & disputes](https://docs.ezpz.fi/concepts/resolution.md): Market settlement and dispute handling.
- [Order lifecycle](https://docs.ezpz.fi/concepts/order-lifecycle.md): From UI confirmation to on-chain settlement.
- [Parlays](https://docs.ezpz.fi/concepts/parlays.md): Multi-leg accumulator predictions.
- [Venues (AMM vs CLOB)](https://docs.ezpz.fi/concepts/venues.md): Execution venues on ezpz.fi.
- [Architecture & settlement](https://docs.ezpz.fi/concepts/architecture.md): On-chain vs off-chain, oracles, positions, pricing model.

### User guides

- [For players](https://docs.ezpz.fi/guides/players.md): Step-by-step playing guide.
- [For makers](https://docs.ezpz.fi/guides/makers.md): Market creation and fee earning.
- [For operators](https://docs.ezpz.fi/guides/operators.md): Resolution, disputes, and treasury.
- [Portfolio](https://docs.ezpz.fi/guides/portfolio.md): Track positions and settlement actions.
- [Account & security](https://docs.ezpz.fi/guides/account-security.md): MFA, email, and role switching.

### Trading

- [Trading overview](https://docs.ezpz.fi/trading/overview.md): End-to-end prediction flow.
- [Place a prediction](https://docs.ezpz.fi/trading/place-prediction.md): Single-market prediction walkthrough.
- [Sell a prediction](https://docs.ezpz.fi/trading/sell-prediction.md): Exit via AMM before resolution.
- [Build a parlay](https://docs.ezpz.fi/trading/build-parlay.md): Multi-leg parlay guide.
- [Deposit & withdraw](https://docs.ezpz.fi/trading/deposit-withdraw.md): Fund and withdraw USDC.
- [Redeem tokens](https://docs.ezpz.fi/trading/redeem.md): Exchange winning tokens after resolution.
- [Refunds (voided markets)](https://docs.ezpz.fi/trading/refund.md): Recover stake when markets are voided.
- [Surrender (cash out)](https://docs.ezpz.fi/trading/surrender.md): Exit early before event end.
- [Fees](https://docs.ezpz.fi/trading/fees.md): Platform, maker, AMM, and parlay fees.

### Resources

- [Smart contracts](https://docs.ezpz.fi/resources/contracts.md): Solana program addresses.
- [On-chain data](https://docs.ezpz.fi/resources/blockchain-data.md): Verify trades and balances on Solana.
- [Geographic restrictions](https://docs.ezpz.fi/resources/geographic-restrictions.md): Jurisdiction gating policies.
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.ezpz.fi/resources/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and fixes.
